title: Cold-Chain Depot Dispersion: Spreading Refrigerated Hubs
strategies: row baseline: place all n depots on the horizontal midline, min pairwise distance = 1/n (reproduces the checker baseline, ~0.1)
farthest-point greedy: from a dense feasible candidate grid (warm zones removed), seed a corner and repeatedly add the candidate farthest from all chosen depots

local search / hill climbing: seed with a coarse grid, then repeatedly relocate one endpoint of the currently closest pair to a feasible spot that increases the minimum pairwise distance, with seeded multi-restart
structured lattice: near-hexagonal / boundary-aware placement clipped to the square and pushed off the warm-zone disks to maximise the smallest inter-depot gap
